zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Pantulf於大約1162年出生在英國史洛普爾維姆時，她的父親Hugh Pantulf19歲，母親Christiana FitzAlan21歲。她於1182年與Sir Robert Corbet在英國英格蘭史洛普爾維姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1227年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾維斯特波利享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma de Pantulf于大约1162年出生在英国史洛普爾維姆时，她的父亲Hugh Pantulf19岁，母亲Christiana FitzAlan21岁。她于1182年与Sir Robert Corbet在英国英格兰史洛普爾維姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1227年在英国英格兰史洛普爾維斯特波利享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Pantulf was born about 1162, in Wem, Shropshire, England, her father, Hugh Pantulf, was 19 and her mother, Christiana FitzAlan, was 21. She married Sir Robert Corbet in 1182, in Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1227, in Westbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Pantulf est née environ 1162, à Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Pantulf, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Christiana FitzAlan, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Corbet en 1182, à Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1227, à Westbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de Pantulf um 1162 in Wem, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Pantulf 19 und ihre Mutter Christiana FitzAlan 21. Sie hat 1182 in Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Robert Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1227 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Westbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Pantulf è nata il circa 1162 nel Wem, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Hugh Pantulf, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Christiana FitzAlan, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Corbet nel 1182, nel Wem, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1227, nel Westbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Pantulfが約1162年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウエムで生まれた時，父Hugh Pantulfは19歳，母Christiana FitzAlanは21歳であった。1182年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウエムでSir Robert Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1227年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウエストブリーで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Pantulf(이)가 대략 1162년 영국 슈럽실르 베에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Pantulf(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christiana FitzAlan(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1182년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 베에서 Sir Robert Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1227년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 웨스트버이에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Pantulf nasceu aproximadamente 1162, em Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Pantulf, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Christiana FitzAlan, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Corbet em 1182, em Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1227, em Westbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Pantulf родилась около 1162 г. в местности вем, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh Pantulf было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Christiana FitzAlan, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Corbet в 1182 г. в местности вем, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1227 г. в местности вестбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma de Pantulf nació aproximadamente 1162, en Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Pantulf, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Christiana FitzAlan, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Corbet en 1182, en Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1227, en Westbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años.
